article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.14. CR - Supply and Delivery of Road Marking Paint and Glass Bead 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $380,000 contract renewal for road marking paint and glass beads
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on renewing a supply contract with Cloverdale Paint Inc. for road marking paint and glass beads, valued at an estimated $380,000 (including taxes) over two years.
briefs.action_required: If you supply road marking materials, monitor future Burnaby RFQ postings for upcoming bid opportunities.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — road marking paint contract renewal vote
